hidden_defects.condition: completed_cycle_count was positive while actual_paper_runtime_executed was mutated false
hidden_defects.impact: operator UI could understate or misrepresent whether PAPER runtime actually executed
hidden_defects.fix: validator now blocks execution flag/count mismatch

hidden_defects.condition: persistent loop cycle_results could repeat collector/cycle ids or hashes
hidden_defects.impact: duplicate cycle evidence could look like multiple independent PAPER cycles
hidden_defects.fix: validator now blocks duplicate cycle ids, collection hashes, and runtime hashes

hidden_defects.condition: cycle artifact paths could be mutated outside UPBIT/KRW_SPOT/PAPER session namespace
hidden_defects.impact: dashboard/evidence could point at cross-mode artifacts
hidden_defects.fix: validator now blocks artifact path namespace escape
